_meta.purpose: CommunityLPVaultV3 addresses for SongRevenueSplitter deploys — answer to VAULT-ADDRESS-REQUEST.md
_meta.method: Enumerated BOTH vault factories' on-chain registries (vaultCount/vaults(i)), read each vault's TOKEN()/LP()/v2Router(), cross-checked vaultsForToken(bandToken), verified eth_getCode > 0 and symbol()/name() for every address listed. Nothing below is from files alone.
_meta.sanityCheck: Method reproduced all 4 previously-confirmed vaults (EBM/RISH/BONGO/DGT) exactly, including EBM's known LP + router.

shared.note: v2Factory/v2Router read from MfTVaultFactory immutables on-chain; every one of the 17 factory vaults returns the same v2Router.

missingEvidence.finding: None of the 10 bands has a CommunityLPVaultV3 on Base. This is verified absence, not a failed lookup: the factory registries are complete on-chain lists and none of the 17 vaults' TOKEN() matches any of the 10 band tokens. Additionally, v2Factory.getPair(Money, bandToken) = 0x0 for all 10 — the Money/band V2 pair a vault would wrap does not exist either. Band liquidity for these 10 currently lives only in one-sided Uniswap V3 fee-10000 walls.
searched: MfTVaultFactory 0x1f6fF7370e2E897db7cf5d72684EF76d988Caaf1 registry: 16 vaults enumerated, TOKEN() read on each (ecowealth, VU, VIRTUAL, TOSHI, YUKI, TRASH, $TIDY, GB, BURGERS, BLACKTIDE, HOLM, DDD, EBM, RISH, BONGO, DGT)
vaultsForToken(bandToken) on both factories: empty for all 10
v2Factory 0x8909Dc15e40173Ff4699343b6eB8132c65e18eC6 getPair(Money, bandToken): zero address for all 10
mftusd-build deploy records: registry.json (miniapp), verify-all-vaults.cjs (direct V3 deploys = BURGERS/TGN/BUSTER/EGP/REGEN only), all *-deployed.json
songsmith-settle.cjs corroborates: JS/NN/RICKY/BIGGINS/JASMINE/HT marked 'vault pending', DD/MYCO/MR no settle route yet
missingEvidence.warning: Do NOT confuse DD (band, 0xa77D43A33AD5C50E27fCf27101c9E6aEfE066CE3) with DDD (nation token 0x87CD3a19a30b7f714dd0D6020dAb8e9EBE4fe8C4) — DDD DOES have a factory vault (0x89F200ad69171fE7b7A8baBC98f1E9Dfca11A808). That is not the DD band vault.

unblockPath: One createVault(token, usdcAmount, tokenAmount, maxImpactBps) tx per band on MfTVaultFactory 0x1f6fF7370e2E897db7cf5d72684EF76d988Caaf1: pulls >= $10 USDC + band tokens from caller, mints Money, creates + seeds the Money/band V2 pair, burns seed LP, clones the vault, registers it. After that, LP()/v2Router() read exactly like the 4 confirmed bands. Who runs/funds the 10 createVault calls is a founder decision — SongRevenueSplitter deploys for these 10 stay blocked until then.
